title: Website launched on GitHub Pages
summary: The academic profile website of Dr. Jitendra Kumar Verma has been prepared with sections covering qualifications, interests, teaching, research, work experience, and contact details.

title: Research and teaching profile refreshed
summary: The profile now highlights work in digital transformation, analytics, enterprise systems, AI/ML, cloud computing, IoT, blockchain, and technology applications for business and capital markets.

title: Daily developments can be posted from one simple file
summary: To post updates, edit the news.json file and add a new item at the top. After committing the change to GitHub, the Latest News section updates automatically on the website.
